title: Ubiquiti Quick-Mount for Ubiquiti CPE Products
description: Toolless Quick-Mounts for Ubiquiti CPE Products Designed for additional mounting flexibility and device alignment options, the Quick-Mount accessory kit features an easy-to-use, toolless design No tools required Quick and easy installation Supports NanoStation, NanoStation Loco, and NanoBeam devices Flexible, easy alignment NBE-2AC-13 NBE-M5-16 UBB GBE NBE-5AC-Gen2 NBE-M5-19 loco5AC NS-5AC LTU-Lite GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
